rationale: Educ. Code §45.257 governs bond credit enhancement endorsement procedures and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
quote: The commissioner shall endorse bonds approved for credit enhancement under this subchapter in substantially the same manner provided under Section 45.057 for endorsing bonds approved under Subchapter C.
_note: No conflict: rule concerns school district bond endorsement mechanics, not homestead exemption levels.
